items.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: The S&P 500 on Tuesday closed down for a fourth straight day, its longest losing streak since August, as investors fret about tech stock valuations.

items.title: McKinsey's $5.2 Trillion AI Warning Collides With JPMorgan's Bubble Fears
items.description: A rare double signal: McKinsey sees a massive infrastructure bill ahead, while JPMorgan hints AI valuations may be running too hot.

items.title: 3 Smart Defensive Stocks for an Uneasy Market
items.description: Recession risks persist despite record market highs. Here are three defensive stocks—including PG, JNJ, and the DIA ETF—that can help protect your portfolio
